title: ImplementReport
description:
What the implement stage leaves behind: the change it made and
what it knowingly left open.

blockers.description:
What prevents progress, one entry per blocker; expected when
the status is `blocked`.

questions.description:
Questions only a human can answer; expected when the status is
`needs_input`.

remaining.description:
Work the agent believes is still open on this unit; feeds the
next iteration's plan.

summary.description: What was built, in the agent's words.

Question.description: A question the agent needs a human to answer before it can proceed.

id.description: The handle an answer is addressed to (`hako answer <run> <id>`).

options.description: Suggested answers; free-text is always allowed.

ReportStatus.description:
The agent's claim about where the loop stands. `done` is a claim,
not a verdict — the engine accepts it only after verify checks pass
and a skeptic iteration fails to refute it.
